html:
Exclusive to:

“Snacks for Beefalo.”

-

Beefalo Treats is a food item exclusive to Don't Starve Together that can only be fed to Beefalos. It is prepared in a Crock Pot from Inedibles, Birchnut seed and Forget-Me-Lots.

Beefalo receive 4 times the listed healing value of any food so they restore 300 health, making them the best beefalo healing item in the game. Dragonpie and Trail Mix keep for 15 days (5 days shorter than Beefalo Treats) and can be eaten by the player, but only restore 160 and 120 hp respectively to beefalo. Additional healing foods for Beefalo are listed in Beefalo.

Recipe

Filler cannot be Meat, Fishes, Monster Food, Eggs, Dairy, and Magic Value.

Examples

×2

By TypeBy Crock Pot Value

–Wurt

–Walter

“Snacks for Beefalo.”

'''Beefalo Treats''' is a [[food]] item exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'' that can only be fed to [[Beefalo]]s. It is prepared in a [[Crock Pot]] from [[Inedibles]], [[Birchnut]] seed and [[Forget-Me-Lots]].

Beefalo receive 4 times the listed healing value of any food so they restore 300 health, making them the best beefalo healing item in the game.  [[Dragonpie]] and [[Trail Mix]] keep for 15 days (5 days shorter than Beefalo Treats) and can be eaten by the player, but only restore 160 and 120 hp respectively to beefalo.  Additional healing foods for Beefalo are listed in [[Beefalo/DST#Hunger (and Health)|Beefalo]].

== {{pic|32|Cookbook}} Recipe ==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Inedible
|item2 = Forget-Me-Lots All
|item3 = Birchnuts
|item4 = Filler
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Beefalo Treats
|note = Filler cannot be [[Meats/DST|Meat]], [[Fishes]], [[Monster Food]], [[Eggs]], [[Dairy]], and [[Magic Value]].
}}
